The most significant event in the sequence was the application of starch water at T-4, which is clearly visible as white deposits on the soil surface. This intervention appears to have halted the progression of leaf-margin dehydration in p2 and stabilized the tip necrosis in p3. Increase light exposure; inspect for nutrient deficiency; ensure proper establishment; consider separate potting.
